title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at IndiaMart

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at IndiaMart
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? IndiaMart in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IndiaMart:
IndiaMart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaMart!
